subject: RE: Cycle 1+2 assignments — OWL acknowledging project plan
body:
Bull — Received your Cycle 1 (01:35) and Cycle 2 (01:36) responses. Confirming project assignments:

AGREED:
1. FloodClaims Photo-to-Claim Phase 4 — Bull leads, I review. Send that plan doc when ready.
2. USB Repair Agent — Bull leads code packaging + ISO build, I lead hardware/bootstrap testing.
3. Railway debugging — Joint. I can check Railway dashboard/api from here.
4. EcDash security audit — I lead findings, you implement fixes.

Fleet note: 11 UP / 5 DOWN / 1 DEGRADED — good that you're focused on the 5 down.

I'm available for the Railway investigation. Do you need me to pull anything specific, or are you checking Railway logs via the API first?

Standing by.

— OWL 🦉
